chunk.text: New York: 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166 0130 Tel: +1 212 878 4122 London: 4th Floor, St Martins Court, 10 Paternoster Row, London EC4M 7BB Tel: +44 20 7489 6767 Sydney: Level 46 Gateway, 1 Macquarie Place, Sydney, NSW 2000 Tel: +61 29 256 9442 Tokyo: 2-1 Ohtemachi 1-Chome, Chiyoda-Ku, Tokyo 100 Tel: +81 33 285 3407 Hong Kong: Suite 1306, Two Exchange Square, 8 Connaught Place, Central, Hong Kong Tel: +852 2899 2026 David Jollie David.jollie@mitprecious.com Tel: +44 20 7489 6762 18 January, 2012 Mitsui Global Precious Metals The Precious Metals in 2012 David Jollie 18 January 2012 Contents • Price forecast • Economic outlook – Europe – North America – China and developing markets • The commodity market and other assets • Gold • Silver • Platinum • Palladium Price forecasts for CY 2011 $560 $860 $745 Palladium $1,305 $1,875 $1,575 Platinum $19.20 $44.60 $30.95 Silver $1,480 $2,075 $1,770 Gold Low High Average

Gold Price(USD/oz) 1,000 1,200 1,400 1,600 1,800 2,000 Jan 10 Mar 10 May 10 Jul 10 Sep 10 Nov 10 Jan 11 Mar 11 May 11 Jul 11 Sep 11 Nov 11 Jan 12 2011: a positive year Source: LBMA -15 -10 -5 0 5 10 15 2001 2002 2003 2004 2005 2006 2007 2008 2009 2010 2011 Official sector buying (million ounces) The official sector Source: WGC, Mitsui Other positives for gold • Chinese buying likely to continue if the price rises • Indian market relatively healthy • European investor demand strong • Safe haven role and prospects of longer term inflation • Increased use of gold as collateral or finance • Above all, risk is positive for the gold price in the short term.

chunk.text: Platinum Fundamentals • Automotive demand stable or growing – EU diesel market share to rise, total market to shrink – HDD and off-road add to demand – But some forward buying has already taken place • Industrial demand looks healthy except for capex • ETF sentiment looking better than in late 2011 • Jewellery positive • Supply side to grow mainly due to recycling • Upside risks remain Palladium Price (USD/oz) 300 400 500 600 700 800 900 Jan 10 Mar 10 May 10 Jul 10 Sep 10 Nov 10 Jan 11 Mar 11 May 11 Jul 11 Sep 11 Nov 11 Jan 12 The palladium price Source: Bloomberg Investor apathy Recycling Direction of the palladium price Palladium price Low interest rates Deficit Forward buying Russian stocks?
